text:
Care Plan ID (Fifth Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the fifth of up to 16 managed care plan identification numbers under which the 
eligible beneficiary is enrolled. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 
The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

States may use their own identifier or the national health plan identifier. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_ID_05_01 
MC_PLAN_ID_05_02 
MC_PLAN_ID_05_03 
MC_PLAN_ID_05_04
